selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 剩余, 备用品, 备件, 备用零件, 备用轮胎；a. 多余的, 备用的, 空闲的, 节约的, 瘦的
words.definition: n. a score in tenpins; knocking down all ten after rolling two balls

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: n. 钥匙, 键, 解答, 关键, 要害, 基调, 线索, 答案, 暗礁；vt. 调音, 锁上, 提供线索
words.definition: n. metal device shaped in such a way that when it is inserted into the appropriate lock the lock's mechanism can be rotated

words.translation: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 贵妇
words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 美, 美人
words.definition: n. the qualities that give pleasure to the senses

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 公主, 王妃, 女巨头
words.definition: n. a female member of a royal family other than the queen (especially the daughter of a sovereign)

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 地板, 楼层, 底部, 底价；vt. 铺地板, 打倒
words.definition: n. the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: adv. 一点也不, 毫不；pron. 没有人, 无一物, 并无一个
words.definition: r. not at all or in no way

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: adv. 以前
words.definition: r. in the past

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: n. 小心, 照料, 忧虑；vi. 关心, 介意
words.definition: n. the work of providing treatment for or attending to someone or something

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄灭, 漠然, 渴望；vt. 死
words.definition: v. pass from physical life and lose all bodily attributes and functions necessary to sustain life

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 土地, 战场, 场地, 地面, 范围；a. 土地的, 地面上的
words.definition: n. a position to be won or defended in battle (or as if in battle)

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 过去, 昔时, 往事, 早年经历, 过去时；a. 过去的, 结束的, 卸任的, 过去时的
words.definition: n. the time that has elapsed

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: n. 姐妹, 姐, 妹, 护士, 修女；vt. 姐妹般对待
words.definition: n. a female person who has the same parents as another person

words.translation: adv. 两次, 两倍
words.definition: r. two times

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
a. 古代的, 古老的, 年老的, 旧的
words.definition: s. belonging to times long past especially of the historical period before the fall of the Western Roman Empire

words.translation: a. 生气的, 愤怒的
words.definition: a. feeling or showing anger

words.translation: n. 百, 百个东西；num. 百, 百个
words.definition: n. ten 10s

words.translation: n. 血, 血统, 流血, 气质, 生命；vt. 使出血, 用血涂
words.definition: n. the fluid (red in vertebrates) that is pumped through the body by the heart and contains plasma, blood cells, and platelets

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: a. no longer having or seeming to have or expecting to have life

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 四分之一, 一刻钟, 季度, 地区；vt. 四等分, 肢解
words.definition: n. a district of a city having some distinguishing character

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 休息, 睡眠, 安息, 稍息, 静止, 支架, 休息处, 其余者, 剩余部分；vi. 休息, 睡, 长眠, 安心, 静止, 停止, 安置, 依赖
words.definition: n. freedom from activity (work or strain or responsibility)

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的
words.definition: n. blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime

words.translation: n. 法院, 庭院, 奉承；vt. 献殷勤, 追求, 招致
words.definition: n. an assembly (including one or more judges) to conduct judicial business

words.translation: n. 发射, 猎场, 射击
words.definition: n. the act of firing a projectile

words.translation: n. 行动, 行为, 幕, 法案；vi. 行动, 表演, 假装, 见效, 表现, 担当
words.definition: n. a legal document codifying the result of deliberations of a committee or society or legislative body

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 驾车, 快车道, 推进力, 驱动, 动力, 击球, 驱动器；vt. 开车, 驱使, 推动, 驾驶
words.definition: n. the act of applying force to propel something

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: a. 自由的, 享受政治权力的, 允许的, 免费的, 丰富的；vt. 释放, 解放, 使自由
n. 未来, 将来；a. 将来的, 未来的
words.definition: n. the time yet to come

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 杀, 杀戮, 小河；vt. 杀, 破坏, 消灭, 使终止, 抵消, 否决
words.definition: n. the destruction of an enemy plane or ship or tank or missile

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达
words.definition: n. the land on which real estate is located

words.translation: n. 笑, 笑声；vi. 笑, 大笑
words.definition: n. the sound of laughing

words.translation: vt. 学习；认识到；得知
words.definition: v. gain knowledge or skills

words.translation: n. 水平, 水准, 平地；a. 同高的, 平坦的, 齐平的, 水平的
words.definition: n. height above ground

words.translation: n. 月
words.definition: n. a time unit of approximately 30 days

words.translation: n. 移动, 迁居, 步骤；vt. 移动, 开动, 感动, 搬(家)
words.definition: n. the act of deciding to do something

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 经过, 要隘, 途径, 通行, 护照, 及格；vt. 经过, 越过, 通过, 批准, 度过, 传递, 忽略
words.definition: n. (military) a written leave of absence

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 上升, 增加, 上涨, 高地, 升高, 出现；vi. 升起, 起身, 起立, 上升, 上涨, 增长, 高耸, 起义, 浮现
words.definition: n. a growth in strength or number or importance

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: n. 房间, 空位, 场所；vi. 住宿, 居住
words.definition: n. an area within a building enclosed by walls and floor and ceiling

words.translation: n. 规则, 统治, 控制, 支配, 规律, 标准, 章程, 破折号, 铅线；vt. 规定, 统治, 管理, 控制, 支配, 裁决
words.definition: n. a principle or condition that customarily governs behavior

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 等待, 等候；vt. 等候, 期待, 延缓, 伺候, 推迟
words.definition: n. the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地
words.definition: a. having great (or a certain) extent from one side to the other

words.translation: n. 婚礼, 结婚, 结婚周年纪念日, 结合
words.definition: n. the social event at which the ceremony of marriage is performed

words.translation: n. 蛋糕, 块, 饼；vt. 使结块, 加块状物于
words.definition: n. a block of solid substance (such as soap or wax)

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 欢喜, 乐事, 高兴；vt. 使快乐, 令人高兴
words.definition: n. the emotion of great happiness

words.translation: vt. 借, 贷款给, 增添, 提供, 出租；vi. 贷款
words.definition: v. bestow a quality on

words.translation: n. 宫, 宫殿, 华丽大厦
words.definition: n. a large and stately mansion

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的
words.definition: n. English phonetician; one of the founders of modern phonetics (1845-1912)

words.translation: adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至
words.definition: r. in truth (often tends to intensify)

words.translation: n. 财产, 所有权, 性质, 属性
words.definition: n. something owned; any tangible or intangible possession that is owned by someone;

words.translation: num. 七, 七个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of six and one

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: a. 干净的, 清白的, 简洁的；adv. 清洁地, 完全地
n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: n. 死亡
words.definition: n. the event of dying or departure from life

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: a. acting or moving or capable of acting or moving quickly

words.translation: vt. 忘记, 忽略, 忘；vi. 忘记
words.definition: v. dismiss from the mind; stop remembering

words.translation: n. 守卫者, 警戒, 护卫队, 防护装置；vt. 保卫, 看守, 当心
words.definition: n. a person who keeps watch over something or someone

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 贿赂；vt. 使结冰, 冰镇, 覆以糖衣
words.definition: n. water frozen in the solid state

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: vt. 邀请, 请求, 引起, 招致；n. 邀请
words.definition: v. increase the likelihood of

words.translation: n. 标志, 分数, 马克, 痕迹, 斑点, 靶子, 刻度, 记号, 符号, 戳记, 标准, 起跑线；vt. 做标记于, 留意, 打分数, 表明, 标志, 记录
words.definition: n. a number or letter indicating quality (especially of a student's performance)

words.translation: n. 英里, 很大距离；[机] 英里, 哩
words.definition: n. a unit of length equal to 1,760 yards or 5,280 feet; exactly 1609.344 meters

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 密切地
n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: a. 富裕的, 富饶的, 浓厚的, 贵重的
words.definition: a. possessing material wealth

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 景观, 视力, 眼界, 阅读, 见解, 意见；vt. 看见, 瞄准
words.definition: n. an instance of visual perception

words.translation: n. 技术, 技巧, 技能, 熟练, 熟练工人
words.definition: n. an ability that has been acquired by training

words.translation: n. 微笑, 喜色, 笑容；vi. 微笑, 觉得好笑
words.definition: n. a facial expression characterized by turning up the corners of the mouth; usually shows pleasure or amusement

words.translation: n. 石头, 宝石, 果核, 纪念碑, 结石；vt. 投扔石子, 铺石头
words.definition: n. building material consisting of a piece of rock hewn in a definite shape for a special purpose

words.translation: n. 事实, 实情
words.definition: n. a fact that has been verified

words.translation: conj. 除非；prep. 除...之外
words.definition: conj. Upon any less condition than (the fact or thing stated

words.translation: n. 声音, 嗓音, 嗓子, 愿望, 发言权, 表达, 喉舌, 语态；vt. 表达, 吐露, 调音
words.definition: n. the distinctive quality or pitch or condition of a person's speech

words.translation: a. 错误的, 不正当的, 失常的；adv. 错误地
